TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Angcoh, title = Angcoh, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Angcoh} }

S.FORM: Angcoh ŚģČťÄöťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan ku niyazu' nu Angcoh. u kasalumaluma' nu Angcoh sa, izaw ku 64 a luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 154 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Yingcumin sa, izaw ku 148 a tademaw, pakalatu 96%. u sulit nu Lipun Wikipayke ŚģČťÄöśł©ś≥Č(ńĀntŇćng wńďnqu√°n „Āā„āď„Ā§„ĀÜ„Āä„āď„Āõ„āď)„ĀĮ ,ŚŹį30Á∑ö21.3KM . u sausi nu cidekay a tademaw u zuma sa, cay ku Yingcumin, 6 ku tademaw, pakalatu 4%. u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis)95%, Yuwatan(Bunun)1%. u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis) u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis) kuyni, katuud ku Pangcah(Amis) itini mueneng. u zuma a tademaw sa u Yuwatan(Bunun). inayi' tu ku zuma cidekay a tademaw itini mueneng. u Sakizaya a tademaw inayi' ku Sakizaya a tademaw mueneng itini, hakay izaw tu, caay henay misumad ku cidekay a ngangan nu Sakizaya. izaw ku malecaday a ngangan nu Sakizaya atu Tayan. maka cacay a bataan ku malecaday a ngangan. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin tademaw nu Yuan-cu-min, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 2 a bulad tademaw nu Yuan-cu-min, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 3 a bulad pulung sausi (560,820), Pangcah (209,203), Tayan (89,958), Paywan (100,591), Yuwatan (58,336), Rukay (13,303), Puyuma (14,118), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,601), Yami (4,599), Saw (780), Kabalan (1,466), Taluku (31,446), Sakizaya (930), Sejek (9,975), Laaluwa (398), Kanakanabu (330), zuma (12,320) tademaw nu Yuan-cu-min, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 6 a bulad pulung sausi (562,395), Pangcah (209,851), Tayan (90,309), Paywan (100,872), Yuwatan (58,509), Rukay (13,326), Puyuma (14,199), Cou (6,632), Saysiat (6,624), Yami (4,615), Saw (788), Kabalan (1,471), Taluku (31,552), Sakizaya (944), Sejek (10,046), Laaluwa (401), Kanakanabu (338), zuma (11,918) tademaw nu Yuan-cu-min, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 10 a bulad pulung sausi (564,603), Pangcah (210,658), Tayan (90,719), Paywan (101,346), Yuwatan (58,759), Rukay (13,373), Puyuma (14,303), Cou (6,659), Saysiat (6,648), Yami (4,625), Saw (792), Kabalan (1,478), Taluku (31,742), Sakizaya (952), Sejek (10,132), Laaluwa (405), Kanakanabu (342), zuma (11,670) tademaw nu Yuan-cu-min, pulung sausi katukuh 2019 a mihcan 1 a bulad pulung sausi (566,129), Pangcah (211,279), Tayan (91,021), Paywan (101,560), Yuwatan (58,994), Rukay (13,390), Puyuma (14,358), Cou (6,668), Saysiat (6,676), Yami (4,635), Saw (803), Kabalan (1,482), Taluku (31,859), Sakizaya (961), Sejek (10,202), Laaluwa (405), Kanakanabu (345), zuma (11,541) u siwkay nu Yuan-cu-min u Yincumin a kamu nu Sakizaya sananay, u ngiha' nu Hulam a kamu nu "ŚéüšĹŹśįĎ". u sakaizaay saan, u saayaway mueneng itiniay a tademaw sananay, itini uyiniyan a subal, tina subal a ngangan sa ku "Taywan", u Hulam a sulit sa ku ŚŹįÁĀ£. u sasubana'ay a kamu sa, Taywan Yincumin sa mikitinay "Timul Subal kamu cidekay " saan. u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiayay a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong , u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). situlu ku kakuniza nu Yincumincu, sakacacay ku ibukelalay, sakatusa ku ibuyuay, sakatulu sa ku tangabulanay . inayay ku cacudadan i Angcoh niyazu'. 1 ku kyukay i Angcoh niyzau'. inayay ku pakincalan i Angcoh niyazu'. inayay ku pikuwanan i Angcoh niyazu'. inayay ku pacudacudadan i Angcoh niyazu'. inayay ku padekuan i Angcoh niyazu'. malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay a natinengan Paykanatalay a pu lumuluma'ay a se kitakit kalunasulitan atu palatuh calay-zazan Yincumincu weiyuanhuy kanatal kalunasulitan atu palatuh calay-zazan sausi kalunasulitan atu palatuh Taywan Yuancumincu nalunasulitan atu palatuh calay zazan laculaculan calay zazan ŚģČťÄöśļęś≥ČAntong akutiay a nemnem ŚģČťÄöśł©ś≥Č -śó•śú¨Á∂≠Śüļ
S.PHON: aŇč ¶ońß **** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu aŇč ¶ońß. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu aŇč ¶ońß sa, izaw ku ** a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu jiŇč ¶umin sa, izaw ku *** a tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun wikipajk…ô ****(*nt*Ňč w*n*u*n ********)* ,******.*km . u sausi nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u zuma sa, ¶aj ku jiŇč ¶umin, * ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis)**%, juwatan(bunun)*%. u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis) u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis) kujni, katuud ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis) itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u juwatan(bunun). inaji Ē~ ° tu ku zuma ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inaji Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇč itini, ńßakaj izaw tu, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj misumad ku ¶id…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja. izaw ku mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja atu tajan. maka ¶a ¶aj a bataan ku mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a ŇčaŇčan. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin tad…ômaw nu juan- ¶u-min, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu juan- ¶u-min, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu juan- ¶u-min, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu juan- ¶u-min, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an ** a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu juan- ¶u-min, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) u siwkaj nu juan- ¶u-min u jin ¶umin a kamu nu sakizaja sananaj, u Ňčińßa Ē~ ° nu ńßur~…ĺam a kamu nu "***". u sakaizaaj saan, u saajawaj mu…ôn…ôŇč itiniaj a tad…ômaw sananaj, itini ujinijan a subar~…ĺ, tina subar~…ĺ a ŇčaŇčan sa ku "tajwan", u ńßur~…ĺam a sur~…ĺit sa ku **. u sasubana Ē~ °aj a kamu sa, tajwan jin ¶umin sa mikitinaj "timur~…ĺ subar~…ĺ kamu ¶id…ôkaj " saan. u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiajaj a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč , u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). situr~…ĺu ku kakuniza nu jin ¶umin ¶u, saka ¶a ¶aj ku ibuk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj, sakatusa ku ibujuaj, sakatur~…ĺu sa ku taŇčabur~…ĺanaj . inajaj ku ¶a ¶udadan i aŇč ¶ońß nijazu Ē~ °. * ku kjukaj i aŇč ¶ońß nijzau Ē~ °. inajaj ku pakin ¶ar~…ĺan i aŇč ¶ońß nijazu Ē~ °. inajaj ku pikuwanan i aŇč ¶ońß nijazu Ē~ °. inajaj ku pa ¶uda ¶udadan i aŇč ¶ońß nijazu Ē~ °. inajaj ku pad…ôkuan i aŇč ¶ońß nijazu Ē~ °. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan pajkanatar~…ĺaj a pu r~…ĺumur~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj a s…ô kitakit kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan atu par~…ĺatuńß ¶ar~…ĺaj-zazan jin ¶umin ¶u w…ôijuanńßuj kanatar~…ĺ kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan atu par~…ĺatuńß ¶ar~…ĺaj-zazan sausi kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan atu par~…ĺatuńß tajwan juan ¶umin ¶u nar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan atu par~…ĺatuńß ¶ar~…ĺaj zazan r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ¶ar~…ĺaj zazan ****antoŇč akutiaj a n…ômn…ôm **** -****
S.FORM: Angcoh ŚģČťÄöťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan ku niyazu' nu Angcoh. u kasalumaluma' nu Angcoh sa, izaw ku 64 a luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 154 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Yingcumin sa, izaw ku 148 a tademaw, pakalatu 96%. u sulit nu Lipun Wikipayke ŚģČťÄöśł©ś≥Č(ńĀntŇćng wńďnqu√°n „Āā„āď„Ā§„ĀÜ„Āä„āď„Āõ„āď)„ĀĮ ,ŚŹį30Á∑ö21.3KM . u sausi nu cidekay a tademaw u zuma sa, cay ku Yingcumin, 6 ku tademaw, pakalatu 4%. u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis)95%, Yuwatan(Bunun)1%. u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis) u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis) kuyni, katuud ku Pangcah(Amis) itini mueneng. u zuma a tademaw sa u Yuwatan(Bunun). inayi' tu ku zuma cidekay a tademaw itini mueneng. u Sakizaya a tademaw inayi' ku Sakizaya a tademaw mueneng itini, hakay izaw tu, caay henay misumad ku cidekay a ngangan nu Sakizaya. izaw ku malecaday a ngangan nu Sakizaya atu Tayan. maka cacay a bataan ku malecaday a ngangan. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin tademaw nu Yuan-cu-min, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 2 a bulad tademaw nu Yuan-cu-min, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 3 a bulad pulung sausi (560,820), Pangcah (209,203), Tayan (89,958), Paywan (100,591), Yuwatan (58,336), Rukay (13,303), Puyuma (14,118), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,601), Yami (4,599), Saw (780), Kabalan (1,466), Taluku (31,446), Sakizaya (930), Sejek (9,975), Laaluwa (398), Kanakanabu (330), zuma (12,320) tademaw nu Yuan-cu-min, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 6 a bulad pulung sausi (562,395), Pangcah (209,851), Tayan (90,309), Paywan (100,872), Yuwatan (58,509), Rukay (13,326), Puyuma (14,199), Cou (6,632), Saysiat (6,624), Yami (4,615), Saw (788), Kabalan (1,471), Taluku (31,552), Sakizaya (944), Sejek (10,046), Laaluwa (401), Kanakanabu (338), zuma (11,918) tademaw nu Yuan-cu-min, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 10 a bulad pulung sausi (564,603), Pangcah (210,658), Tayan (90,719), Paywan (101,346), Yuwatan (58,759), Rukay (13,373), Puyuma (14,303), Cou (6,659), Saysiat (6,648), Yami (4,625), Saw (792), Kabalan (1,478), Taluku (31,742), Sakizaya (952), Sejek (10,132), Laaluwa (405), Kanakanabu (342), zuma (11,670) tademaw nu Yuan-cu-min, pulung sausi katukuh 2019 a mihcan 1 a bulad pulung sausi (566,129), Pangcah (211,279), Tayan (91,021), Paywan (101,560), Yuwatan (58,994), Rukay (13,390), Puyuma (14,358), Cou (6,668), Saysiat (6,676), Yami (4,635), Saw (803), Kabalan (1,482), Taluku (31,859), Sakizaya (961), Sejek (10,202), Laaluwa (405), Kanakanabu (345), zuma (11,541) u siwkay nu Yuan-cu-min u Yincumin a kamu nu Sakizaya sananay, u ngiha' nu Hulam a kamu nu "ŚéüšĹŹśįĎ". u sakaizaay saan, u saayaway mueneng itiniay a tademaw sananay, itini uyiniyan a subal, tina subal a ngangan sa ku "Taywan", u Hulam a sulit sa ku ŚŹįÁĀ£. u sasubana'ay a kamu sa, Taywan Yincumin sa mikitinay "Timul Subal kamu cidekay " saan. u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiayay a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong , u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). situlu ku kakuniza nu Yincumincu, sakacacay ku ibukelalay, sakatusa ku ibuyuay, sakatulu sa ku tangabulanay . inayay ku cacudadan i Angcoh niyazu'. 1 ku kyukay i Angcoh niyzau'. inayay ku pakincalan i Angcoh niyazu'. inayay ku pikuwanan i Angcoh niyazu'. inayay ku pacudacudadan i Angcoh niyazu'. inayay ku padekuan i Angcoh niyazu'. malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay a natinengan Paykanatalay a pu lumuluma'ay a se kitakit kalunasulitan atu palatuh calay-zazan Yincumincu weiyuanhuy kanatal kalunasulitan atu palatuh calay-zazan sausi kalunasulitan atu palatuh Taywan Yuancumincu nalunasulitan atu palatuh calay zazan laculaculan calay zazan ŚģČťÄöśļęś≥ČAntong akutiay a nemnem ŚģČťÄöśł©ś≥Č -śó•śú¨Á∂≠Śüļ
S.PHON: aŇč ¶ońß **** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu aŇč ¶ońß. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu aŇč ¶ońß sa, izaw ku ** a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu jiŇč ¶umin sa, izaw ku *** a tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun wikipajk…ô ****(*nt*Ňč w*n*u*n ********)* ,******.*km . u sausi nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u zuma sa, ¶aj ku jiŇč ¶umin, * ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis)**%, juwatan(bunun)*%. u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis) u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis) kujni, katuud ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis) itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u juwatan(bunun). inaji Ē~ ° tu ku zuma ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inaji Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇč itini, ńßakaj izaw tu, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj misumad ku ¶id…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja. izaw ku mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja atu tajan. maka ¶a ¶aj a bataan ku mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a ŇčaŇčan. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin tad…ômaw nu juan- ¶u-min, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu juan- ¶u-min, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu juan- ¶u-min, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) u siwkaj nu juan- ¶u-min u jin ¶umin a kamu nu sakizaja sananaj, u Ňčińßa Ē~ ° nu ńßur~…ĺam a kamu nu "***". u sakaizaaj saan, u saajawaj mu…ôn…ôŇč itiniaj a tad…ômaw sananaj, itini ujinijan a subar~…ĺ, tina subar~…ĺ a ŇčaŇčan sa ku "tajwan", u ńßur~…ĺam a sur~…ĺit sa ku **. u sasubana Ē~ °aj a kamu sa, tajwan jin ¶umin sa mikitinaj "timur~…ĺ subar~…ĺ kamu ¶id…ôkaj " saan. u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiajaj a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč , u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). situr~…ĺu ku kakuniza nu jin ¶umin ¶u, saka ¶a ¶aj ku ibuk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj, sakatusa ku ibujuaj, sakatur~…ĺu sa ku taŇčabur~…ĺanaj . inajaj ku ¶a ¶udadan i aŇč ¶ońß nijazu Ē~ °. * ku kjukaj i aŇč ¶ońß nijzau Ē~ °. inajaj ku pakin ¶ar~…ĺan i aŇč ¶ońß nijazu Ē~ °. inajaj ku pikuwanan i aŇč ¶ońß nijazu Ē~ °. inajaj ku pa ¶uda ¶udadan i aŇč ¶ońß nijazu Ē~ °. inajaj ku pad…ôkuan i aŇč ¶ońß nijazu Ē~ °. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan pajkanatar~…ĺaj a pu r~…ĺumur~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj a s…ô kitakit kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan atu par~…ĺatuńß ¶ar~…ĺaj-zazan jin ¶umin ¶u w…ôijuanńßuj kanatar~…ĺ kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan atu par~…ĺatuńß ¶ar~…ĺaj-zazan sausi kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan atu par~…ĺatuńß tajwan juan ¶umin ¶u nar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan atu par~…ĺatuńß ¶ar~…ĺaj zazan r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ¶ar~…ĺaj zazan ****antoŇč akutiaj a n…ômn…ôm **** -****
